description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular structure with a steeply pitched gable roof in a dark brown color. The exterior walls are clad in a light tan material, likely wood or stucco, giving it a natural and understated appearance. A small, square wooden door with a round metallic knob is present on one side, serving as the main entryway. There is a single, small cylindrical chimney protruding from the roof, and a yellow ramp or walkway extends from the rear of the house. The house lacks visible windows, contributing to a minimalist and utilitarian design. The overall form and details suggest a basic, functional residential building suitable for a suburban or rural setting.
description: A simple, tan rectangular house with a steep gable roof, a small wooden door, a chimney, and a yellow ramp at the back. The design is minimalist with no visible windows.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with the gable roof and a yellow ramp extending from the back.
description_view_1: This top-down view highlights the dark brown gable roof and the small cylindrical chimney.
description_view_2: This view displays the front of the house, featuring the small wooden door with a round knob and part of the yellow ramp.
description_view_3: This rear view shows the yellow ramp or walkway extending from the back wall, with no visible doors or windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple square wooden door with a round knob, no porch or decorative elements
